data.title: Japan Ground Self-Defense Force adopts MEDIROM MOTHER Labs’ REMONY for advanced health monitoring; powered by MOTHER Bracelet; Sept. 18, 2025.
data.description: In Tokyo on September 18, 2025, MEDIROM Healthcare Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ: MRM) made public that its branch, MEDIROM MOTHER Labs Inc., has initiated the distribution of its remote health monitoring system dubbed "REMONY" to the Japan Ground Self-Defense Force (JGSDF). This system is supported by the innovative recharge-free smart tracker known as MOTHER Bracelet ®. This advancement marks a significant progression in enhancing healthcare services for the JGSDF.

data.title: Aventis Energy completes KorrAI Technology Program at Corvo Uranium Project in Saskatchewan.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on September 18, 2025, Aventis Energy Inc. successfully concluded its KorrAI Technology Program with KorrAI Technologies Inc. at the Corvo Uranium Project in the Athabasca Basin, Saskatchewan. Aventis, trading as AVE on the CSE, C0O0 on the FRA, and VBAMF on the OTC, confirmed the achievement on their Property.

data.title: Canada police seizes $56M in Bitcoin, XRP, Ethereum, Litecoin from TradeOgre exchange for violating regulations.
data.description: Canadian authorities reported that a cryptocurrency exchange failed to adhere to anti-money laundering regulations. As a result, the Royal Canadian Mounted Police seized Ethereum, Litecoin, and other digital assets from the exchange.

data.title: WaterBridge closes upsized IPO of 31.7M Class A shares at $20/share, raising $635M. Underwriters exercise option for 4.755M shares.
data.description: A company based in Houston, WaterBridge Infrastructure LLC, successfully completed an enlarged IPO of 31,700,000 Class A shares at $20.00 each, generating significant public interest. Further adding to the success, underwriters fully exercised their option to acquire 4,755,000 additional Class A shares. The overall offering exceeded expectations and showcased the confidence investors have in WaterBridge.

data.title: Interfaith America founder Eboo Patel honored with NPT Top 50 for third year, recognized for leadership in promoting diversity.
data.description: On September 18, 2025, Eboo Patel, the founder and president of Interfaith America, was recognized for the third year in a row as part of The NonProfit Times' Power & Influence Top 50. This acknowledgment highlights Patel's significant national role in promoting pluralism as a cohesive approach to diversity.

data.title: Lawsuit filed against GEI Consultants Inc. by Lawyers Alleging Failure to Provide Meal Periods and Rest Breaks, violating California Labor Codes.
data.description: It has been reported that GEI Consultants, Inc. is facing accusations of failing to appropriately compensate employees by not providing required meal breaks, leading to a violation of numerous California Labor codes. The incident allegedly took place in Sacramento, as per an attorney advertisement on September 18, 2025. The company’s actions have raised concerns about potential discrepancies in wages for the affected employees.

data.title: Roman DBDR Acquisition Corp. II received a deficiency letter from Nasdaq for not maintaining a share price of $1 or more.
data.description: On September 18, 2025, Roman DBDR Acquisition Corp. II disclosed receiving a Deficiency Notice from Nasdaq due to non-compliance with listing qualifications. Nasdaq informed the Company of certain deficiencies that need to be addressed promptly to maintain its listing status. The specific areas of concern were outlined in the notice sent by Nasdaq's Listing Qualifications Department. The Company is now required to submit a plan of compliance within a specified timeframe to rectify the identified issues. Failure to meet Nasdaq's requirements could result in the Company's delisting from the exchange, impacting its trading status and market presence.

data.title: Wayne A. Thorp named BetterInvesting CEO, effective Sept. 22, to boost investor education growth.
data.description: In Troy, Michigan on September 18, 2025, BetterInvesting has revealed the appointment of Wayne A. Thorp, CFA, as the new Chief Executive Officer, starting on September 22, 2025. Wayne brings extensive experience as a nonprofit financial services executive and individual investor to the role. This move signals a notable change in leadership for the company.

data.title: McAfee partners with "TRON: Ares" for 'Secure Your Grid' campaign to combat online scams during Cybersecurity Awareness Month.
data.description: A leading online protection company, McAfee, based in San Jose, California, has unveiled a new campaign called "Secure Your Grid" to coincide with the release of "TRON: Ares" in theaters on October 10. Launched during Cybersecurity Awareness Month, this initiative includes various creative elements, such as a specially crafted advertisement incorporating scenes from the upcoming movie. The aim of the campaign is to enhance engagement and educate individuals on safeguarding against sophisticated AI threats prevalent today.

data.title: Reitmans (Canada) Limited's Q2 FY 2026: Net revenues $215.9M, comparable sales down 1.3%, adjusted EBITDA $21.4M, net earnings $13.1M.
data.description: Reitmans (Canada) Limited reported its financial results for the second quarter of fiscal 2026, ending on August 2, 2025. Despite having three fewer stores, the net revenues were $215.9 million, a slight increase from last year. Comparable sales decreased by 1.3%, with a gross profit margin decrease to 56.9%. Adjusted EBITDA was $21.4 million, $2 million lower than the previous year. Net earnings were $13.1 million, or $0.26 per share. The company's working capital on August 2, 2025, was $149.6 million, including cash of $125.3 million. Reitmans cited foreign exchange impacts and focused promotions affecting profits. The CEO highlighted the success of their summer collection and upcoming store renovations, with a new RW&CO flagship store opening soon in Quebec.

data.title: GCG Data Centers unveils new strategies for efficiency, offering tailor-made solutions for complex challenges.
data.description: Today, in Chicago, on September 18, 2025, GCG, a top communication, power, and automation solutions provider, unveiled its latest advancement in data center technology. Reassuring high performance through renowned brands and tailored solutions, GCG aims to tackle practical challenges. This step marks the next phase in GCG's Data segment, showcasing cutting-edge innovation to enhance operations.

data.title: Mtron wins major production contract for new Data Link; prestigious deal from top U.S. Department.
data.description: In Orlando, Florida on September 18, 2025, M-tron Industries, Inc. (NYSE American: MPTI) disclosed that it secured a substantial production contract from a prominent U.S. Department. M-tron is a key player in supplying high-performance radio frequency components and solutions. The specific financial details of the contract were not disclosed.

data.title: IDEX Corp. (NYSE:IEX) increases share repurchase authorization to total capacity of $1 billion, also declares regular dividend.
data.description: IDEX Corp., headquartered in Northbrook, Illinois, has revealed a new share purchase authorization that increases the company's total repurchase capacity to $1 billion. This move, announced without disclosing the source, allows the company to buy back shares up to the specified amount. The corporation's stock is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol IEX.

data.title: Solana's price may surge to $300 driven by institutional adoption and anticipation of ETF approval, after surging past $250.
data.description: The price of SOL surged past $250 due to increasing interest from institutional investors and anticipation for approval of an ETF, leading to predictions of a continued upward trend in the market.

data.title: Century Communities to build 170 homes in Green Cove Springs, FL, expanding presence in Jacksonville.
data.description: A renowned national home builder, Century Communities, Inc. (NYSE: CCS), is set to establish 170 homesites in the rapidly expanding Green Cove Springs area near Jacksonville, Florida. With a reputation as one of the top 10 players in the industry, Century Communities is known for its expertise in online home sales and has been recognized on America's Most Trustworthy list. The development of these homesites marks a significant milestone for the company as it continues to make its mark in the housing market.

data.title: Gemmy's Airblown® Halloween Lights collection has arrived at Lowe's, featuring festive inflatables for Halloween displays. Available now in Dallas.
data.description: New Airblown® Halloween Lights collection from Gemmy now accessible at Lowe's in Dallas from September 18, 2025. Transform your Halloween display with fiery effects, friendly faces, and fall flair. Make a powerful statement with these decorations. Embrace the Halloween spirit with this amazing lineup.

data.title: IAC & TPC partner for biomass as clean energy solution in US. Collaboration aims to scale sustainable biomass use.
data.description: In Overland Park, Kansas on September 16, 2025, a partnership has been formed between IAC and The Price Companies (TPC) in response to the increasing shift towards clean and renewable energy in the U.S. This collaboration focuses on sustainable biomass as a solution. This joint effort aims to address the growing demand for eco-friendly energy sources by leveraging the expertise and resources of both companies. The partnership is geared towards providing a scalable and timely approach to meeting the country's energy needs sustainably.

data.title: Stock market sees Dow as the biggest loser of the day, small caps lower. Bitcoin miner surges..indices drop.The post by Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: The stock market saw small caps reducing bigger losses before ending the day lower. Meanwhile, a bitcoin miner experienced a surge. The Dow was the biggest loser of the day. Additionally, a uranium company gave up earlier gains.

data.title: SandRidge Mississippian Trust I wins summary judgment in Securities Litigation case against Duane & Virginia Lanier Trust. Deadline for appeal is October 14, 2025.
data.description: Houston-based SANDRIDGE MISSISSIPPIAN TRUST I (OTC: SDTTU) revealed today that on September 11, 2025, the court ruled in favor of the Trust in the Duane & Virginia Lanier Trust v. SandRidge Mississippian Trust I case (referred to as the “Securities Litigation”). The plaintiff has until October 14, 2025 to appeal the court’s decision. If no appeal or post-judgment motion is filed by then, the litigation against the Trust will be considered closed.

data.title: NGL Energy Partners LP declares cash distribution for Class B & Class C Preferred Units ending Sept 30, 2025.
data.description: In Tulsa, Oklahoma, NGL Energy Partners LP declared a distribution for the quarter ending September 30, 2025. The Board of Directors of its general partner approved the payment to holders of the Partnership’s 11.765% Class B Floating Rate Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Units and the 11.675% Class C Floating Rate Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Units. The distribution is in accordance with the terms outlined by the partnership. The announcement did not disclose the exact amount of the distribution.
